message.content:
# Detailed UI Description: Design Management Dashboard

## Overall Layout Structure
This is a comprehensive design management dashboard with a left sidebar navigation, top header, and main content area. The layout follows a standard enterprise application pattern with:
- Fixed left sidebar (approx. 220px width)
- Top header bar spanning full width
- Main content area occupying remaining space
- Multiple card-based sections in the content area

## Sidebar Navigation
The left sidebar contains a hierarchical navigation menu with the following structure:

**Top Section:**
- "Design Management" (main header, bold text)
- "Project Dashboard" (sub-header)

**Navigation Items (organized in sections):**
1. **Project Overview**
   - Home
   - Project Details
   - Timeline
   - Team Members

2. **Design Assets**
   - Design Files
   - Mockups
   - Prototypes
   - Style Guide

3. **Collaboration**
   - Comments
   - Reviews
   - Feedback
   - Version History

4. **Settings**
   - Account Settings
   - Notification Preferences
   - Integrations

The sidebar uses a light gray background with darker text for active items and lighter text for inactive items. Some items have small icons next to them.

## Header/Appbar Design
The top header contains:
- Left side: "Design Management" logo/text
- Right side: User profile icon and notification bell icon
- Background: White with subtle shadow
- Height: Approx. 50px

## Main Content Area Layout
The main content area is divided into several card-based sections:

### Section 1: Progress Bar
- Title: "Project Progress" (small text)
- Large progress indicator: "0%" in red
- Background: Light pink/rose color
- Small X button in top-right corner

### Section 2: Notes Section
- Title: "Notes" with edit icon
- Text area with placeholder text
- Formatting toolbar (bold, italic, underline, etc.)
- Light gray background

### Section 3: Design Management Header
- Title: "Design Management"
- Subtitle: "Manage your design assets and documentation"

### Section 4: Design Strategy & Governance
- Three dropdown selectors:
  - "Design Methodology" (dropdown)
  - "Design Standards" (dropdown) 
  - "Design System" (dropdown)

### Section 5: Two-Column Layout
**Left Column - Design Documents:**
- Title with document icon
- Empty state with folder icon
- "No documents uploaded" text
- Green "Add Document" button

**Right Column - Design Tools:**
- Title with tools icon
- Empty state with tools icon
- "No tools configured" text
- Yellow "Add Tool" button

### Section 6: System Architecture
- Title: "System Architecture"
- Small "Live Demo" link
- Right-side action buttons (edit, delete, etc.)

### Section 7: Design Tools Section
- Title: "Design Tools"
- Multiple tool cards/entries with icons
- "Rich Text Editor" section with formatting toolbar
- "Design Notes" section with text area

## Color Scheme
- Primary: White background
- Accent: Red (#e53e3e) for progress indicator
- Secondary: Light pink/rose (#fed7d7) for progress bar
- Success: Green (#38a169) for "Add Document" button
- Warning: Yellow (#ecc94b) for "Add Tool" button
- Text: Dark gray (#2d3748) for main text
- Light gray: #f7fafc for backgrounds, #e2e8f0 for borders

## Widget Patterns
- **Cards**: Multiple card components with rounded corners and subtle shadows
- **Dropdowns**: Standard select dropdowns with arrows
- **Buttons**: Various styles (primary, secondary, outlined)
- **Text areas**: With formatting toolbars
- **Empty states**: With icons and descriptive text
- **Progress indicators**: Simple percentage display
- **Tabs/sections**: Organized content areas

## Typography Styles
- **Headers**: Sans-serif, bold, larger size (24px)
- **Subheaders**: Sans-serif, medium weight (16px)
- **Body text**: Sans-serif, regular weight (14px)
- **Small text**: Sans-serif, light weight (12px)
- **Buttons**: Sans-serif, medium weight (14px)

## Specific UI Elements
- Progress bar with percentage display
- Text formatting toolbar (B, I, U, etc.)
- Empty state components with icons
- Action buttons with different color schemes
- Dropdown selectors
- User profile and notification icons in header
- Multiple card layouts with consistent spacing
- Section headers with icons
- Tool configuration interface

This layout represents a comprehensive design management system with project tracking, document management, and collaboration features, organized in a clean, modern interface suitable for professional use.
